scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 5 legacy-parity read streams only; the full OnceHub surface (booking mutations, availability, webhooks) is out of scope until Pass B

excluded.reason: /v2/bookings is a mutation endpoint; this bundle has no reviewed write record schema, approval risk, or legacy write contract for that operation

/v2/availability is an additional documented read resource not implemented by legacy; this bundle does not declare its stream schema, pagination contract, or fixtures
/v2/webhooks is an additional documented read resource not implemented by legacy; this bundle does not declare its stream schema, pagination contract, or fixtures
